config_template.output_tensor: optional preallocated tensor of same shape {DIM}

applicability_notes: ttnn_replacement: ttnn.erfinv(input_tensor, output_tensor=output_tensor, queue_id=cq_id); constraints: {'input_range_note': 'torch.erfinv is defined on (-1, 1); values outside produce nan/inf. Test exercises inputs in [-10, 10] against golden torch.erfinv.', 'layout': 'TILE_LAYOUT', 'elementwise': True, 'shape_preserving': True}; fusion_notes: Pure elementwise unary; eligible for unary op-chain fusion and as a fused activation epilogue on producer ops where supported.

placement_observations.source: unit test: data_gen_with_range(input_shapes, -10, 10, device) — default interleaved DRAM placement, no explicit memory_config at call site
unit test: preallocated output_tensor passed via output_tensor= kwarg, default interleaved DRAM
